title: Tempad Loot Structures
description: A simple datapack that spawns structures with Tempad loot.
body:
This datapack spawns structures in the Overworld & The End, containing loot items from the [Tempad](https://modrinth.com/mod/tempad) mod.

- Overworld generates Basic(Iron) Tier items.
- The End generates Advanced(Time Steel) Tier items.
